raw_response_text:
<features>
- observable feature: flower has trumpet-shaped petals
- observable feature: flower color is blue/purple with lighter center
- observable feature: background includes green leaves and a wire fence
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has trumpet-shaped petals AND flower color is blue/purple with lighter center] THEN [75]
- IF [flower has long, slender petals with distinct lip AND background is dark] THEN [35]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a flower with trumpet-shaped petals and blue/purple color with a lighter center, matching the features of class 75.
</rule_check>
<response>75</response>

- observable feature: center of flower is purple and yellow
